architects: Brinkman & Van der Vlugt (Leendert van der Vlugt), with Mart Stam and engineer J.G. Wiebenga

minecraft_notes.stepped_silhouette: 8 floors tobacco / 5 floors coffee / 3 floors tea - descending from south to north
key_features: Glass curtain wall facades (first prefabricated curtain wall in the world)
Sloping conveyor bridges connecting production to warehouse/logistics
Mushroom columns (flat slab, no beams) supporting open floor plates
Curved office/directors building at the front entrance
Cylindrical stair towers at ends of factory blocks
Reinforced concrete frame with steel-and-glass skin

wikimedia_commons_categories.notes: Main category has 215+ files. Browse these categories directly for the most comprehensive CC-licensed image collection.

search_notes: WebFetch was blocked during collection, so some image_url fields point to gallery/article pages rather than direct image files. Visit the source_url pages to find and download specific images. Wikimedia Commons URLs use the pattern: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/[hash]/[filename]/[width]px-[filename]. The WikiArquitectura page is the single best source for architectural drawings (plans, elevations, sections).
